title: Food cans
description: Adds canned (stackable) versions of soups and 2 new meals.
body:
![main image](https://preview.redd.it/images-for-my-mod-v0-si4hgjwl1oyf1.png?width=320&crop=smart&auto=webp&s=2224b5933ff8b5901baed457d4dc1493de04e6da)

Mod that adds 6 new items, a can, 3 can versions of vanilla soups/stews that stack, and 2 new foods, tushonka (way to get more food out of a steak at the cost of making it have a worse saturation ratio) and condensed milk (stacks, clears effects, and gives you a bit of food.) 

There are 2 versions of the mod, one which makes the soups and tushonka regen some health, and the other that just makes them normal foods.

Eating any of the food items gives back the can, so make sure you pick up after yourself.

this is my first mod btw, I hope whoever plays with it likes it :>

 

Empty can: 1 Iron ingot, 1 Iron nugget in this shape

![can crafting recipe](https://preview.redd.it/images-for-my-mod-v0-3mlq0umm1oyf1.png?width=320&crop=smart&auto=webp&s=bb05d07be809f1384b25b1d6275dabe46187f8f3)

Mushroom stew can: 1 Empty can, 1 Red mushroom, 1 Brown mushroom shapeless

![mushroom stew can](https://preview.redd.it/images-for-my-mod-v0-03x4xxlm1oyf1.png?width=320&crop=smart&auto=webp&s=847c7c92d2ef232ea55110ba90bad26e43e79b5a)

Beetroot soup can: 1 Empty can, 6 Beetroots shapeless

![beetroot soup](https://preview.redd.it/images-for-my-mod-v0-r5jhjr1m1oyf1.png?width=320&crop=smart&auto=webp&s=6634a35785a2ad597d374756e6d7da64ed53daf9)

Rabbit stew can: 1 Empty can, 1 Cooked rabbit, 1 Carrot, 1 Cooked potato, 1 Red/Brown mushroom shapeless

![rabbit stew](https://preview.redd.it/images-for-my-mod-v0-jkhqgxlm1oyf1.png?width=320&crop=smart&auto=webp&s=07979124bba1cd89f02d4e28d1165a06f741b95a)

Tushonka: 2 Empty cans, 1 Steak shapeless (you get 2 tushonkas, I just forgot to fix it before taking the screenshots :P)

![tushonka](https://preview.redd.it/images-for-my-mod-v0-ngt0dumm1oyf1.png?width=320&crop=smart&auto=webp&s=611766a8b8cef20a37a321cc1ef878708abdc2ca)

Condensed Milk: 1 Empty can, 1 Milk bucket, 2 Sugar shapeless (You get back the bucket)

![condensed milk](https://preview.redd.it/images-for-my-mod-v0-2es33t8m1oyf1.png?width=320&crop=smart&auto=webp&s=2abe527663d25d46ca0d7636abb1f8c14b827f27)
